applied.negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, serial numbers, labels, label-like marks, document text, chart text, diagram text, whiteboard writing, UI, captions, subtitles, poster design, logos, NASA logo, agency insignia, mission patches, flags, flag-like colored patch, colored cloth, Shuttle markings, Challenger wordmark, copied archival image, copied diagram, exact historical room, named-person likeness, recovered hardware trophy, complete O-ring, small complete ring, rubber gasket ring, tabletop full field joint, full SRB field joint model, full launch tower, full launch pad silhouette, wide launch pad establishing shot, visible vehicle, vehicle identity, product photography, jewelry, glossy product macro, glowing seam, orange glow, red glow, flame path, smoke jet, plume, explosion, fireball, debris scene, bodies, over-blue color grade, blue monochrome, heavy ice fantasy, theatrical fog, dramatic haze, fog, psychedelic, surreal floating parts, multiple symbolic events, clutter, warped geometry, generic charred debris, torn cloth, loose soot fragments, ash smear, soot cloud, trophy hardware
applied.positive_prompt: restrained editorial evidence still, source-grounded material carrier, one clear subject, controlled neutral light, calm frame, no spectacle, Vertical source-grounded close material evidence still of anonymous unbranded industrial steel and concrete, a cropped steel pipe support and concrete ledge in pale neutral morning light, thin frost and small ice beads visible on the surfaces, cold reads as a restrained material condition on infrastructure rather than a dramatic scene, no full launch tower, no vehicle, no flag, no colored cloth, no fog, no blue monochrome, no readable markings, no logos.

notes: Derived from the official ComfyUI Flux.2 Dev text-to-image workflow.
Adapted to expose negative_prompt, batch_size, seed, and filename_prefix for this lab.
The negative prompt branch is retained as an unconnected CLIPTextEncode node because the official FLUX.2 Dev text-to-image path is positive-guidance-first.
Export-time model loader filenames are patched from FluxLab runtime config so local-safe checkpoints can replace the official quantized default.

inputs.text: restrained editorial evidence still, source-grounded material carrier, one clear subject, controlled neutral light, calm frame, no spectacle, Vertical source-grounded close material evidence still of anonymous unbranded industrial steel and concrete, a cropped steel pipe support and concrete ledge in pale neutral morning light, thin frost and small ice beads visible on the surfaces, cold reads as a restrained material condition on infrastructure rather than a dramatic scene, no full launch tower, no vehicle, no flag, no colored cloth, no fog, no blue monochrome, no readable markings, no logos.
